chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. S-849 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on office objection as at ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 26.1.2026 --------------------- None present for the petitioner without intimation. This is an old petition of 2024, which is pending adjudication. It was lastly fixed on 24.11.2025 when none was in attendance on behalf of the petitioner. It appears that the petitioner is not in attendance since 20.5.2025, which shows lack of interest of the petitioner in pursuing this petition. Accordingly, the instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith pending application(s), if any. JUDGE Zahid/*
